introQuote: Every website is a valuable link between you and your users.
introText: Former professional chef turned web developer, I build websites and applications for SMEs and restaurants in French-speaking Switzerland. The same precision as a starred kitchen — applied to your online presence.
contactCTA: Got a project? Write to me
message: A website is more than just existing online — it's a true bridge to your customers. Through clear, simple, and smooth experiences, I help you build a strong and lasting connection with them.

services.title: Automation & AI integrations
description: Automate repetitive tasks and free up valuable time
Automatic AI translation for your multilingual content
Connect your existing services (CRM, forms, online booking)
Third-party integrations: Google Maps, EventFrog, Supabase and more

services.title: Professional & multilingual websites
description: A modern and fast website to attract your customers
Smooth and intuitive navigation on all devices (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Multilingual version to reach an international audience
Search engine optimized (SEO) for better online visibility

services.title: Business applications & content management
description: Save time with custom tools tailored to your business
Intuitive admin interface to manage your content easily
Personalized dashboards to track your key metrics
Modern architecture with fast and stable performance

sections.title: My Journey
content: After a career as a chef, I chose web development for a simple reason: to create tools that truly change the lives of entrepreneurs and associations.

Coming from haute cuisine where precision and excellence were vital, I applied this rigor to code. Trained in web and mobile development (professional certification), I now build websites and applications that combine technical performance with concrete impact.

sections.title: My Approach
content: → Obsessive attention to detail – every pixel, every line of code matters. In gastronomy, mistakes were unforgiving. Today, this excellence serves your projects.
→ True listening – I don't sell you a one-size-fits-all solution. I take time to understand your business, constraints, and ambitions.
→ Human relationships – as a practicing Buddhist, I believe in mutual respect, trust, and transparency. Working together means building a long-term relationship, not just delivering a website.

sections.title: How I Work
content: My process is simple and clear:
1️⃣ Phone consultation – we discuss your project, no commitment
2️⃣ Specifications – I analyze them or we build them together
3️⃣ Transparent quote – you know exactly what you're paying for
4️⃣ Delivery in 3-4 weeks for a showcase website
5️⃣ Support – training, maintenance, I remain available
No unnecessary technical jargon. No unrealistic promises. Just serious work, on time, with measurable results.

pricing.title: Pricing
notes: Payment in CHF or EUR accepted
Pay in 2 or 3 installments, no extra fees
Hosting and domain name included for the first year
Training on how to use your site included

contact.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your needs together and find the ideal solution for your business.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Hello, I would like to discuss a project for [showcase site / pro site / application]. Can you contact me back?

footer.tagline: Custom web solutions for Swiss SMEs
